pi_items.source: CISA AA23-075A and MITRE ATT&CK - LockBit documented as using RDP and PsExec

pi_items.metadata_value: Data Encrypted for Impact (T1486) - Encryption of victim files

privileged_info_summary: The task references CISA Advisory AA23-075A, a real joint cybersecurity advisory from FBI, CISA, and MS-ISAC regarding LockBit 3.0 ransomware released March 16, 2023. All threat tactics mentioned are accurate: LockBit gains initial access via phishing (T1566), uses valid compromised accounts, exploits RDP, dumps credentials using Mimikatz and ProDump (T1003), performs lateral movement via RDP/SMB and PsExec (T1021, T1569.002), and impacts systems through AES-256/ChaCha20 encryption (T1486) and VSS deletion (T1490). The synthetic report created by the task accurately reflects real LockBit attack chains documented in CISA AA23-075A.
